scripts.test: npm run test:blockhash && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:dataTypes && npm run test:load && npm run test:load10k && npm run test:solidvm && npm run test:upload && npm run test:upload10k && npm run test:loadFF && npm run test:truchainz && npm run test:multicontract && npm run test:uploadOrder && npm run test:slipstream
scripts.test:e2e: npm run mocha-ts e2e/createUser.test.ts e2e/import.constructor.test.ts e2e/import.test.ts e2e/offline-txs.test.ts
scripts.test:dataTypes: npm run mocha-ts regressions/address.test.ts regressions/bool.test.ts regressions/bytes.test.ts regressions/enum.test.ts regressions/string.test.ts regressions/uint.test.ts regressions/negative.test.ts
scripts.test:load: npm run mocha-ts load/stratoLoad.test.ts --batchCount 20 --batchSize 20 && npm run mocha-ts load/stratoLoadFactory.test.ts --batchCount 20 --batchSize 20
scripts.test:upload: npm run mocha-ts load/uploadString.test.ts --batchCount 10 --batchSize 10 && npm run mocha-ts load/uploadUniqueAddresses.test.ts --batchCount 10 --batchSize 10
